name: Press Security Update v3.4.135
notes:
> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Security update.** Apply this release promptly through the Press System Updates tool.

## Migration Guide

Use the System Updates tool in Markdown Editor to download and apply `press-system-v3.4.135.zip`.

## System Package

- Asset: `press-system-v3.4.135.zip`
- SHA-256: `8dad0a0e4b823a38ecf4859a9715c26d5c63ef082a110e81c7ce1e77d9e8942c`

- assets/js/editor-main-sidebar-file-tree.js
- assets/press-system.json

- scripts/test-theme-contract-package.mjs

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/EkilyHQ/Press/compare/v3.4.134...v3.4.135

upgradeFrom.message: Press v3.4.64 through v3.4.134 can update directly to security update v3.4.135.
